name: change-the-time-window
goal: Resize the chart's visible time window by dragging a header edge port, with live preview, then commit.

steps.note: First-time user moves over the timescale header. Expect hover-gated window ports (SR-WIN-05) to appear at left/right edges — discoverable without docs (SR-IXC-13).
Ports visible on header hover? Idle chrome stays calm elsewhere.
Drag the right window port left ~1 week. Expect live axis preview + date pill (SR-WIN-09/11, SR-IXC-03); shapes not rewritten per move.
After drop: window committed, chart rescaled, rail complete for all rows (SR-WIN-19/20).
Surface neutral; no sticky window-drag cursor.
